category_title: Students who prioritize learning and demonstrating ability through effective strategy use
scenario_title: Grammar quiz with social comparison distraction
minimal_context: The student is taking a grammar quiz during a 2nd grade whole-class language arts lesson.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is the grammar quiz. Please read the straightforward questions and write your answers.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I want to get a really high grade on this quiz to demonstrate my ability to you and to my peers.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, go ahead and start working.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks around the classroom) Are the other kids already on the next section? I want to make sure I'm doing better than them.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to answer the questions.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't pay attention to my own questions. I keep watching everyone else because I need to see if they are finishing before me.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is the grammar quiz. Please read the straightforward questions and write your answers.

STUDENT: I want to get a really high grade on this quiz to demonstrate my ability to you and to my peers.

TUTOR: Okay, go ahead and start working.

STUDENT: (Looks around the classroom) Are the other kids already on the next section? I want to make sure I'm doing better than them.

TUTOR: Keep trying to answer the questions.

STUDENT: I can't pay attention to my own questions. I keep watching everyone else because I need to see if they are finishing before me.

task.content: grammar quiz with clear and straightforward questions and answers

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: encountered difficulties in regulating attention away from comparison with others during engagement, which interfered with his attention during engagement in the task
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: wanting to achieve high grades and to demonstrate their ability to the teacher and to peers

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: interfered with his attention during engagement in the task
